case_title: LUZ ARACELI TLAPALAMALT RODRIGUEZ VS. GUILLERMO JOSEPH RUIZ GUZMAN

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TLAPALAMALT RODRIGUEZ, LUZ ARACELI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RUIZ GUZMAN, GUILLERMO JOSEPH $12,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $12,500.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

NOT REPORTED.(D506)
